header.title: Key Account
header.description: Move hot leads through the pipeline — review, book, and graduate them to customers.

toolbar.syncTitle: Import hot leads + graduated customers from n8n
toolbar.runPipelineTitle: Trigger the Hot Leads Pipeline in n8n
toolbar.clearDescription: Deletes every hot lead in this CRM (linked customers are kept). Test-data reset — this can't be undone.

status.syncResult: Synced from n8n — {imported, plural, one {# lead} other {# leads}}, {customers, plural, one {# new customer} other {# new customers}} (scanned {scanned}).
status.syncNotConfigured: n8n API not configured — set N8N_API_URL / N8N_API_KEY to sync.
status.pipelineNotConfigured: Hot Leads Pipeline webhook not configured (set N8N_HOT_LEADS_PIPELINE_WEBHOOK_URL).

add.title: Add hot lead
add.description: Add a lead by hand. It lands in the Interested column.

detail.noContracts: No contracts generated for this lead yet.
